Section 1
def count_word_occurrences(text, word):
    import re
    pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(word.lower()) + r'\b'
    return len(re.findall(pattern, text.lower()))

Section 2
The function converts both text and target word to lowercase to ensure case insensitivity. It then uses regular expressions to match whole words only, avoiding partial matches within other words.

Section 3
No two adjacent words can start with consecutive letters of the alphabet.
